header.title: Pricing that grows with you
header.subtitle: BriefFill turns rough client briefs into structured, client-ready specs. Pick the plan that fits your team — switch or cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.description: Try BriefFill on your next project.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What happens if I exceed the Free plan limit?
faq.a1: BriefFill will block the analysis and show an upgrade prompt. You can upgrade to Pro for unlimited briefs, or wait until the 1st of next month when the counter resets.
faq.q2: When does the brief count reset?
faq.a2: On the 1st of each month (UTC). Pro, Team, and Agency plans have unlimited briefs — no counter.
faq.q3: Can I switch between monthly and annual?
faq.a3: Yes. The Stripe Customer Portal lets you cancel and resubscribe with any billing cycle. Annual plans get 20% off.
faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a4: All major credit cards via Stripe. ACH/wire for Agency plan (contact support).
faq.a5: The Free plan is the trial. You get 5 briefs per month at no cost. No credit card required to sign up.
faq.a6: Yes. Cancel from the Billing page; you keep access until the end of the current period, then drop to the Free plan.

cta.title: Try BriefFill free
cta.subtitle: 5 briefs per month, no credit card required. Upgrade only when you need more.
